- **Успіх і біда**: І добрий, і поганий.
- **Байдужість**: Ні добрий, ні поганий.

name: Barkskin
description: You touch a willing creature. Until the spell ends, the target's skin assumes a bark-like appearance, and the target has an Armor Class of 17 if its AC is lower than that.
description_ua: Ви торкаєтеся доброї істоти. До завершення дії заклинання шкіра цілі набуває вигляду кори, і Клас Обладунку (КК) цілі стає рівним 17, якщо до цього він був нижчим.

name: Blindness/Deafness
description: One creature that you can see within range must succeed on a Constitution saving throw, or it has the Blinded or Deafened condition (your choice) for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.
description_ua: Одна істота, яку ви бачите в межах дистанції, повинна успішно пройти рятувальний кидок Витривалості або отримати стан Сліпий або Глухий (на ваш вибір) на час дії заклинання. Наприкінці кожного свого ходу ціль повторює ряткидок.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Blur
description: Your body becomes blurred. For the duration, any creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. An attacker is immune to this effect if it perceives you with Blindsight or Truesight.
description_ua: Ваше тіло розмивається. На час дії заклинання будь-яка істота має Перешкоду на кидки атаки проти вас. Нападник має імунітет до цього ефекту, якщо він бачить вас за допомогою Сліпого зору (Blindsight) або Істинного зору (Truesight).

name: Calm Emotions
description:
Each Humanoid in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within range must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be affected by one of the following effects (choose for each creature): 

• The creature has Immunity to the Charmed and Frightened conditions until the spell ends. If the creature was already Charmed or Frightened, those conditions are suppressed for the duration. 

• The creature becomes Indifferent about creatures of your choice that it's Hostile toward. This indifference ends if the target takes damage or witnesses its allies taking damage. When the spell ends, the creature's attitude returns to normal.
description_ua:
Кожен Гуманоїд у Сфері радіусом 20 футів повинен успішно пройти рятувальний кидок Харизми або потрапити під один з ефектів:

- Істота отримує імунітет до станів Очарований та Переляканий. Поточні такі стани пригнічуються.
- Істота стає Байдужою до вказаних вами істот, до яких вона була вороже налаштована. Байдужість закінчується, якщо вона отримає шкоду.

name: Continual Flame
material: ruby dust worth 50+ GP, which the spell consumes
description: A flame springs from an object that you touch. The effect casts Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. It looks like a regular flame, but it creates no heat and consumes no fuel. The flame can be covered or hidden but not smothered or quenched.
description_ua: Полум'я спалахує на предметі, якого ви торкаєтеся. Воно випромінює Яскраве світло в радіусі 20 футів. Воно виглядає як звичайне полум'я, але не виділяє тепла і не потребує палива. Його неможливо загасити водою або нестачею повітря.

name: Darkness
material: bat fur and a piece of coal
description:
For the duration, magical Darkness spreads from a point within range and fills a 15-foot-radius Sphere. Darkvision can't see through it, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it. 

Alternatively, you cast the spell on an object that isn't being worn or carried, causing the Darkness to fill a 15-foot Emanation originating from that object. Covering that object with something opaque, such as a bowl or helm, blocks the Darkness.

If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of Bright Light or Dim Light created by a spell of level 2 or lower, that other spell is dispelled.
description_ua:
Магічна темрява поширюється з точки в межах дистанції, заповнюючи Сферу радіусом 15 футів. Нічний зір (Darkvision) не може бачити крізь неї, а немагічне світло не може її розсіяти.

Крім того, ви можете накласти це на предмет. Якщо область цього заклинання перекривається зі світлом від заклинання 2-го рівня або нижче, те заклинання розсіюється.

name: Darkvision
description: For the duration, a willing creature you touch has Darkvision with a range of 150 feet.
description_ua: На час дії заклинання добра істота, якої ви торкаєтеся, отримує Нічний зір (Darkvision) на відстань 150 футів.

name: Detect Thoughts
description:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns. 

**Sense Thoughts.** You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present. 

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead. 

**Read Thoughts.** Target one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself or one creature within 30 feet of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on the target's mind right now. If the target doesn't know any languages and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing. 

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into the target's mind. If you probe deeper, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, you discern the target's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms large in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from the target's mind, the target can take an action on its turn to make an Intelligence (Arcana) check against your spell save DC, ending the spell on a success.
description_ua: Ви можете відчувати присутність думок у радіусі 30 футів. Ви можете читати поверхневі думки істоти («Read Thoughts»). Ви можете спробувати зануритися глибше, але тоді ціль проходить ряткидок Мудрості і дізнається про ваше втручання.

name: Dragon's Breath
description: You touch one willing creature, and choose Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. Until the spell ends, the target can take a Magic action to exhale a 15-foot Cone. Each creature in that area makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 damage of the chosen type on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.
description_ua: Ви торкаєтеся доброї істоти та обираєте тип шкоди: Кислота, Холод, Вогонь, Блискавка або Отрута. До завершення дії заклинання ціль може Магічною дією видихнути конус у 15 футів. Кожна істота в цій зоні проходить рятувальний кидок Спритності, отримуючи 3д6 шкоди обраного типу у разі провалу.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Enhance Ability
description: You touch a creature and choose Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. For the duration, the target has Advantage on ability checks using the chosen ability.
description_ua: Ви торкаєтеся істоти та обираєте одну з характеристик: Сила, Спритність, Інтелект, Мудрість або Харизма. На час дії заклинання ціль має Перевагу на перевірки обраної характеристики.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2. You can choose a different ability for each target.

name: Enlarge/Reduce
description:
For the duration, the spell enlarges or reduces a creature or an object you can see within range (see the chosen effect below). A targeted object must be neither worn nor carried. If the target is an unwilling creature, it can make a Constitution saving throw. On a successful save, the spell has no effect. 

Everything that a targeted creature is wearing and carrying changes size with it. Any item it drops returns to normal size at once. A thrown weapon or piece of ammunition returns to normal size immediately after it hits or misses a target. 

**Enlarge.** The target's size increases by one category—from Medium to Large, for example. The target also has Advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. The target's attacks with its enlarged weapons or Unarmed Strikes deal an extra 1d4 damage on a hit. 

**Reduce.** The target's size decreases by one category—from Medium to Small, for example. The target also has Disadvantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. The target's attacks with its reduced weapons or Unarmed Strikes deal 1d4 less damage on a hit (this can't reduce the damage below 1).
description_ua:
**Збільшення**: Розмір цілі збільшується на одну категорію. Ціль має Перевагу на перевірки та ряткидки Сили. Атаки завдають додатково 1д4 шкоди.

**Зменшення**: Розмір цілі зменшується на одну категорію. Ціль має Перешкоду на перевірки та ряткидки Сили. Атаки завдають на 1д4 менше шкоди (мінімум 1).

name: Enthrall
description: You weave a distracting string of words, causing creatures of your choice that you can see within range to make a Wisdom saving throw. Any creature you or your companions are fighting automatically succeeds on this save. On a failed save, a target has a −10 penalty to Wisdom (Perception) checks and Passive Perception until the spell ends.
description_ua: Ви виплітаєте відволікаючу низку слів, змушуючи обраних вами істот пройти рятувальний кидок Мудрості. У разі провалу ціль отримує штраф -10 до перевірок Мудрості (Уважність) та Пасивної уважності.

name: Find Steed
description:
You summon an otherworldly being that appears as a loyal steed in an unoccupied space of your choice within range. This creature uses the **Otherworldly Steed** stat block. If you already have a steed from this spell, the steed is replaced by the new one. The steed resembles a Large, rideable animal of your choice, such as a horse, a camel, a dire wolf, or an elk. Whenever you cast the spell, choose the steed's creature type-Celestial, Fey, or Fiend which determines certain traits in the stat block. 

**Combat.** The steed is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, it shares your Initiative count, and it functions as a controlled mount while you ride it (as defined in the rules on mounted combat). If you have the Incapacitated condition, the steed takes its turn immediately after yours and acts independently, focusing on protecting you. 

**Disappearance of the Steed.** The steed disappears if it drops to 0 Hit Points or if you die. When it disappears, it leaves behind anything it was wearing or carrying. If you cast this spell again, you decide whether you summon the steed that disappeared or a different one.
description_ua:
Ви закликаєте потойбічну істоту, яка з'являється як вірний скакун. Ви використовуєте стат-блок **Потойбічний скакун** (Otherworldly Steed). Ви обираєте тип істоти: Небожитель, Фея або Ірод.

Скакун діє як союзник. У бою він має ту саму Ініціативу, що і ви, і діє як керований скакун, поки ви їдете на ньому.

name: Find Traps
description:
You sense any trap within range that is within line of sight. A trap, for the purpose of this spell, includes any object or mechanism that was created to cause damage or other danger. Thus, the spell would sense the Alarm or Glyph of Warding spell or a mechanical pit trap, but it wouldn't reveal a natural weakness in the floor, an unstable ceiling, or a hidden sinkhole. 

This spell reveals that a trap is present but not its location. You do learn the general nature of the danger posed by a trap you sense.
description_ua: Ви відчуваєте будь-яку пастку в межах прямої видимості в радіусі дії. Заклинання відчуває магічні пастки (як *Alarm*) або механічні. Ви дізнаєтеся про факт наявності пастки та загальний тип небезпеки, але не її точне місце розташування.

name: Flame Blade
description:
You evoke a fiery blade in your free hand. The blade is similar in size and shape to a scimitar, and it lasts for the duration. If you let go of the blade, it disappears, but you can evoke it again as a Bonus Action. 

As a Magic action, you can make a melee spell attack with the fiery blade. On a hit, the target takes Fire damage equal to 3d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. 

The flaming blade sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.
description_ua: Ви створюєте вогняний клинок (схожий на ятаган) у вільній руці. Ви можете здійснювати ним ближні атаки заклинанням, завдаючи 3д6 + заклинальна характеристика шкоди вогнем. Клинок випромінює світло.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Flaming Sphere
description:
You create a 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It lasts for the duration. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of the sphere makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. 

As a Bonus Action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet, rolling it along the ground. If you move the sphere into a creature's space, that creature makes the save against the sphere, and the sphere stops moving for the turn. 

When you move the sphere, you can direct it over barriers up to 5 feet tall and jump it across pits up to 10 feet wide. Flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried start burning if touched by the sphere, and it sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet.
description_ua: Ви створюєте вогняну сферу діаметром 5 футів. Істоти поруч зі сферою проходять ряткидок Спритності, отримуючи 2д6 шкоди вогнем. Бонусною дією ви можете переміщувати сферу на 30 футів.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Gentle Repose
material: 2 copper pieces, which the spell consume
description:
You touch a corpse or other remains. For the duration, the target is protected from decay and can't become Undead. 

The spell also effectively extends the time limit on raising the target from the dead, since days spent under the influence of this spell don't count against the time limit of spells such as Raise Dead.
description_ua: Ви торкаєтеся трупа. Протягом 10 днів він захищений від розкладання і не може стати Нежиттю. Також це продовжує ліміт часу для заклинань воскресіння (як *Raise Dead*).

name: Gust of Wind
description:
A Line of strong wind 60 feet long and 10 feet wide blasts from you in a direction you choose for the duration. Each creature in the Line must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away from you in a direction following the Line. A creature that ends its turn in the Line must make the same save. 

Any creature in the Line must spend 2 feet of movement for every 1 foot it moves when moving closer to you.

The gust disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles and similar unprotected flames in the area. It causes protected flames, such as those of lanterns, to dance wildly and has a 50 percent chance to extinguish them. 

As a Bonus Action on your later turns, you can change the direction in which the Line blasts from you.
description_ua: Лінія сильного вітру довжиною 60 футів б'є від вас. Істоти в ній повинні пройти ряткидок Сили, інакше будуть відштовхнуті на 15 футів. Вітер розсіює туман та гасить відкрите полум'я.

name: Heat Metal
material: a piece of iron and a flame
description:
Choose a manufactured metal object, such as a metal weapon or a suit of Heavy or Medium metal armor, that you can see within range. You cause the object to glow red-hot. Any creature in physical contact with the object takes 2d8 Fire damage when you cast the spell. Until the spell ends, you can take a Bonus Action on each of your later turns to deal this damage again if the object is within range. 

If a creature is holding or wearing the object and takes the damage from it, the creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or drop the object if it can. If it doesn't drop the object, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the start of your next turn.
description_ua: Ви змушуєте металевий предмет розжаритися до червоного кольору. Будь-яка істота в контакті з ним отримує 2д8 шкоди вогнем. Бонусною дією можна завдавати шкоду повторно. Істота повинна пройти ряткидок Витривалості, щоб не впустити предмет.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Invisibility
material: an eyelash encased in gum arabic
description: A creature you touch has the Invisible condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early if the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.
description_ua: Істота, якої ви торкаєтеся, отримує стан Невидимий. Заклинання закінчується достроково, якщо ціль атакує, завдає шкоду або накладає заклинання.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Knock
description:
Choose an object that you can see within range. The object can be a door, a box, a chest, a set of shackles, a padlock, or another object that contains a mundane or magical means that prevents access. 

A target that is held shut by a mundane lock or that is stuck or barred becomes unlocked, unstuck, or unbarred. If the object has multiple locks, only one of them is unlocked. 

If you choose a target that is held shut with Arcane Lock, that spell is suppressed for 10 minutes, during which time the target can be opened and shut normally. 

When you cast the spell, a loud knock, audible within 300 feet, echoes from the target object.
description_ua: Ви відкриваєте замок, засув або кайдани. Якщо об'єкт зачинений за допомогою *Arcane Lock*, це заклинання пригнічується на 10 хвилин. При накладанні лунає гучний стукіт, чутний на 300 футів.

name: Lesser Restoration
description: You touch a creature and end one of the following conditions on it: Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, or Poisoned.
description_ua: Ви торкаєтеся істоти та припиняєте один із її станів: Сліпий, Глухий, Паралізований або Отруєний.

name: Levitate
material: a small leather loop or a piece of golden wire bent into a cup shape with a long shank on one end
description:
One creature or loose object of your choice that you can see within range rises vertically up to 20 feet and remains suspended there for the duration. The spell can levy a target that weighs up to 500 pounds. An unwilling creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw to resist the spell. 

The target can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object or surface within reach (such as a wall or a ceiling), which allows it to move as if it were climbing. You can change the target's altitude by up to 20 feet in either direction as a Bonus Action. If you are the target, you can move up or down as part of your movement. Otherwise, you can use your movement to vertically move the target up to 20 feet, provided it is within the spell's range. 

When the spell ends, the target floats gently to the ground if it is still aloft.
description_ua: Істота або предмет вагою до 500 фунтів піднімається вертикально на висоту до 20 футів. Недобровільна істота проходить ряткидок Витривалості. Ви можете змінювати висоту цілі як Бонусною дією, так і частиною свого переміщення.

name: Locate Animals or Plants
description: Describe or name a specific kind of Beast or plant. You learn the direction and distance to the closest creature or plant of that kind within 5 miles, if any are present.
description_ua: Назвіть вид Звіра або рослини. Ви дізнаєтеся напрямок та відстань до найближчого представника цього виду в радіусі 5 миль.

name: Locate Object
description:
Describe or name an object that is familiar to you. You sense the direction to the object's location, provided that object is within 1,000 feet of you. If the object is in motion, you know the direction of its movement. 

The spell can locate a specific object known to you as long as you have seen it up close (within 30 feet) at least once. Alternatively, the spell can locate the nearest object of a particular kind, such as a certain kind of apparel, jewelry, furniture, tool, or weapon. 

This spell can't locate an object if any thickness of lead blocks a direct path between you and the object.
description_ua: Назвіть знайомий вам предмет. Ви відчуєте напрямок до нього, якщо він знаходиться в межах 1000 футів. Свинець блокує це заклинання.

name: Magic Mouth
material: a bit of honeycomb and jade dust worth 10+ GP, which the spell consumes
description:
You implant a message within an object within range, a message that is uttered when a trigger condition occurs. Choose an object that you can see and that isn't being worn or carried by another creature. Then speak the message, which must be twenty-five words or fewer and can be delivered over as long as 10 minutes. Finally, determine the circumstance that will trigger the spell to deliver your message. 

When that circumstance occurs, a magical mouth appears on the object and recites the message in your voice and at the same volume you spoke. If the object chosen has a mouth or something that looks like a mouth (for example, the mouth of a statue), the magical mouth appears there, so the words appear to come from the object's mouth. When you cast this spell, you can have the spell end after it delivers its message, or it can remain and repeat its message whenever the trigger occurs. 

The triggering circumstance can be as general or as detailed as you like, though it must be based on visual or audible conditions that occur within 30 feet of the object. For example, you could instruct the mouth to speak when any creature moves within 30 feet of the object or when a silver bell rings within 30 feet of it.
description_ua: Ви записуєте на предмет повідомлення (до 25 слів), яке буде вимовлене при виконанні певної умови (візуальної або звукової в межах 30 футів). Можна вибрати, чи зникнуть вуста після першого разу.

name: Magic Weapon
description: You touch a nonmagical weapon. Until the spell ends, that weapon becomes a magic item with a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls.
description_ua: Ви торкаєтеся немагічної зброї. Вона стає магічною з бонусом +1 до кидків атаки та шкоди.
higherLevelSlot: The bonus increases to +2 with a spell slot of level 4 or higher and to +3 with a spell slot of level 6 or higher.

name: Acid Arrow
material: powdered rhubarb leaf and an adder's stomach
description: A shimmering green arrow streaks toward a target within range and bursts in a spray of acid. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 4d4 Acid damage immediately and 2d4 Acid damage at the end of its next turn. On a miss, the arrow splashes the target with acid for half as much of the initial damage and no damage at the end of its next turn.
description_ua: Ви вистрілюєте кислотною стрілою. Здійсніть далеку атаку заклинанням. При влучанні ціль отримує 4д4 шкоди кислотою одразу та ще 2д4 в кінці свого наступного ходу.
higherLevelSlot: The initial damage increases by 1d4 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Mind Spike
description: You reach into the mind of one creature you can see within range. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, taking 3d8 Psychic damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. On a failed save, you also always know the target's location until the spell ends, but only while the two of you are on the same plane of existence. While you have this knowledge, the target can't become Hidden from you, and if it has the Invisible condition, it gains no benefit from that condition against you.
description_ua: Ціль повинна пройти ряткидок Мудрості, отримуючи 3д8 психічної шкоди у разі провалу. Також при провалі ви завжди знаєте точне місцезнаходження цілі, поки вона на тому самому плані існування.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Mirror Image
description:
Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear in your space. Until the spell ends, the duplicates move with you and mimic your actions, shifting position so it's impossible to track which image is real. 

Whenever a creature makes an attack roll against you, roll a d20 to determine whether the attack instead targets one of your duplicates. 

If you have three duplicates, you must roll a 6 or higher to change the attack's target to a duplicate. With two duplicates, you must roll an 8 or higher. With one duplicate, you must roll an 11 or higher. 

A duplicate's AC equals 10 plus your Dexterity modifier. If an attack hits a duplicate, it is destroyed. A duplicate can be destroyed only by an attack that hits it. It ignores all other damage and effects. The spell ends when all three duplicates are destroyed. 

A creature is unaffected by this spell if it can't see, if it relies on senses other than sight, such as Blindsight, or if it can perceive illusions as false, as with Truesight.
description_ua: Створює три ілюзорні копії вас. Коли вас атакують, кидайте к20, щоб визначити, чи влучила атака в копію замість вас. КК копії = 10 + ваш модифікатор Спритності. Кожна копія зникає після одного влучання.

name: Misty Step
description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.
description_ua: Ви миттєво телепортуєтеся на відстань до 30 футів у вільне місце, яке бачите.

name: Moonbeam
material: several seeds of any moonseed plant and a piece of opalescent feldspar
description:
A silvery beam of pale light shines down in a 5-foot-radius, 40- foot-high Cylinder centered on a point within range. Until the spell ends, Dim Light fills the Cylinder. 

When a creature enters the Cylinder for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there, it makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d10 Radiant damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A Shapechanger makes its saving throw with Disadvantage; if it fails, it also instantly reverts to its original form and can't assume a different form until it leaves the light. 

On each of your later turns as a Bonus Action, you can move the beam up to 60 feet in any direction.
description_ua: Промінь світла б'є зверху в точку в межах дистанції. Істоти в ньому повинні пройти ряткидок Витривалості, отримуючи 2д10 шкоди сяйвом. Змінювачі форми мають Перешкоду та можуть бути змушені повернутися до справжнього вигляду.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Arcanist's Magic Aura
description:
You place an illusion on a creature or an object you touch so that divination spells reveal false information about it. The target can be a willing creature or an object that isn't being worn or carried by another creature. 

When you cast the spell, choose one or both of the following effects. The effect lasts for the duration. If you cast this spell on the same creature or object every day for 30 days, placing the same effect on it each time, the illusion lasts until it is dispelled. 

**False Aura.** You change the way the target appears to spells and magical effects, such as Detect Magic, that detect magical auras. You can make a nonmagical object appear magical, a magical object appear nonmagical, or change the object's magical school so that it appears to belong to a specific school. When you use this effect on an object, you can make the false magic apparent to any creature who touches the item. 

**Mask.** You change the way the target appears to spells and magical effects that detect creature types, such as a paladin's Divine Sense or the Detect Evil and Good spell. You choose a creature type, and other spells and magical effects treat the target as if it were a creature of that type or of that alignment.
description_ua: Ви накладаєте ілюзію на істоту або предмет, щоб приховати її справжню магічну природу або вид істоти від заклинань виявлення (замінити ауру або замаскувати вид).

name: Pass without Trace
material: ashes from a burned leaf of mistletoe and a sprig of spruce
description: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from you, masking you and your companions from detection. For the duration, you and each ally within 30 feet of you have a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks and can't be tracked except by magical means. A creature that receives this bonus leaves no tracks or other traces of its passage.
description_ua: Ви та ваші союзники в радіусі 30 футів отримуєте бонус +10 до перевірок Спритності (Стелс) і не залишаєте слідів.

name: Phantasmal Force
description:
You craft an illusion in the mind of a creature you can see within range. The target makes an Intelligence saving throw. On a successful save, the spell fails. On a failed save, you create a phantasmal object, creature, or other visible phenomenon of your choice that is no larger than a 10-foot Cube and that is perceivable only to the target. The phantasm includes sound, temperature, and other stimuli, also evident only to the target. 

While the target is affected by the spell, the target treats the phantasm as if it were real. The target rationalizes any illogical outcomes from interacting with the phantasm. For example, a target attempting to walk across a phantasmal bridge that spans a chasm falls once it steps onto the bridge. If the target survives the fall, it believes that it was pushed or that it slipped. 

The phantasm can also deal damage to the target. A phantasm created to appear as a creature, for example, could appear to attack the target. Each round on your turn, the phantasm can deal 1d6 Psychic damage to the target if the phantasm is in the target's space or within 5 feet of it. The target perceives the damage as a type appropriate to the illusion. 

The target can take an action to examine the phantasm. To do so, it makes an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC. On a success, the spell ends.
description_ua: Ви створюєте ілюзію в розумі істоти. Ціль проходить ряткидок Інтелекту. У разі провалу вона сприймає ілюзію як реальність, включаючи звук та температуру. Ілюзія може завдавати 1д6 психічної шкоди щораунду.

name: Prayer of Healing
description: You utter a prayer that restores vitality to companions. Up to five creatures of your choice that you can see within range gain the benefits of a Short Rest. A creature can't benefit from this spell again until it finishes a Long Rest.
description_ua: Ви промовляєте молитву, яка відновлює сили. До п'яти істот у межах дистанції отримують переваги Короткого відпочинку. Істота може скористатися цим лише раз до Довгого відпочинку.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Protection from Poison
description: You touch a willing creature. If the creature has the Poisoned condition, that condition ends. For the duration, the target has Resistance to Poison damage and Advantage on saving throws to end or avoid the Poisoned condition.
description_ua: Ви торкаєтеся доброї істоти. Стан Отруєний закінчується. На час дії ціль має Стійкість до шкоди отрутою та Перевагу на ряткидки проти отруєння.

name: Ray of Enfeeblement
description: A black beam of enervating energy springs from your finger toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 Necrotic damage and has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned in this way, the target also deals only half damage with weapon attacks that use Strength.
description_ua: Промінь некротичної енергії завдає 2д8 шкоди та накладає стан Отруєний до кінця наступного ходу цілі. Поки ціль отруєна, вона завдає лише половину шкоди збройними атаками на Силі.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Rope Trick
material: powdered corn extract and a twisted loop of parchment
description:
You touch a rope that is up to 60 feet long. One end of the rope then rises into the air until the whole rope hangs perpendicular to the ground. At the upper end of the rope, an invisible entrance opens to an extradimensional space that lasts until the spell ends. 

The extradimensional space can be reached by climbing to the top of the rope. The space can hold as many as eight Medium or smaller creatures. The rope can be pulled into the space, making it disappear from outside the space. 

Spells and attacks can't pass through the entrance into or out of the extradimensional space, and creatures inside the space can't see out of it. 

Anything inside the extradimensional space drops out when the spell ends.
description_ua: Ви торкаєтеся мотузки до 60 футів. Вона піднімається вертикально, і на її верхівці відкривається вхід у позавимірний простір на 8 істот. Ви можете затягнути мотузку всередину.

name: Scorching Ray
description:
You create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. You can hurl them at one target or several. 

Make a ranged spell attack for each ray. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 Fire damage.
description_ua: Ви створюєте три вогняні промені. Для кожного променя здійсніть далеку атаку заклинанням. При влучанні — 2д6 шкоди вогнем.
higherLevelSlot: You create one additional ray for each spell slot level above 2.

name: See Invisibility
material: a pinch of talc and a small sprinkle of powdered silver
description: For the duration, you can see creatures and objects that have the Invisible condition as if they were visible, and you can see into the Ethereal Plane. Ethereal creatures and objects appear ghostly and translucent.
description_ua: Протягом години ви бачите невидимих істот та об'єкти так, ніби вони видимі. Також ви бачите на Ефірний план.

name: Shatter
description:
A sudden loud ringing noise, painfully intense, erupts from a point you choose within range. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point makes a Constitution saving throw. A creature takes 3d8 Thunder damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature made of inorganic material such as stone, crystal, or metal makes the saving throw with Disadvantage. 

A nonmagical object that isn't being worn or carried also takes the damage if it's in the spell's area.
description_ua: Гучний звук у Сфері радіусом 10 футів завдає 3д8 шкоди громом (рядткидок Витривалості). Неорганічні істоти (камінь, метал) мають Перешкоду на ряткидок.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Shining Smite
castingTrigger: which you take immediately after hitting a target with a melee weapon or an unarmed strike
description: As you hit the target, it takes an extra 2d6 Radiant damage from the attack, and its location is shed in a 5-foot radius of Dim Light until the spell ends. The target can't benefit from the Invisible condition, and until the spell ends, attack rolls against it have Advantage if the attacker can see the target.
description_ua: При влучанні ціль отримує додатково 2д6 шкоди сяйвом і яскраво підсвічується. Вона не може отримувати переваги від невидимості, а атаки проти неї мають Перевагу.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Silence
description:
For the duration, no sound can be created within or pass through a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within range. Any creature or object entirely inside the Sphere is immune to Thunder damage, and creatures are Deafened while entirely inside it. 

Casting a spell that includes a Verbal component is impossible there.
description_ua: У Сфері радіусом 20 футів неможливо створити або почути звук. Істоти там мають статус Глухий та імунітет до шкоди громом. Заклинання з вербальним компонентом неможливі.

name: Spider Climb
material: a drop of bitumen and a spider
description: Until the spell ends, a willing creature you touch gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings while leaving its hands free. The target also gains a Climb Speed equal to its Speed.
description_ua: Добра істота отримує здатність рухатися по вертикальних поверхнях та стелях, залишаючи руки вільними. Швидкість лазіння дорівнює Швидкості ходьби.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

name: Spike Growth
material: seven sharp thorns or seven small twigs, each with at least one sharp point
description:
The ground in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within range twists and sprouts hard spikes and thorns. The area becomes Difficult Terrain for the duration. When a creature moves into or within the area, it takes 2d4 Piercing damage for every 5 feet it travels. 

The transformation of the ground is camouflaged to look natural. Any creature that can't see the area at the time the spell is cast must take a Study action to examine the terrain and succeed on a Wisdom (Perception) check against your spell save DC to recognize the area as hazardous before entering it.
description_ua: Земля в радіусі 20 футів вкривається шипами (Важкопрохідна місцевість). Істоти отримують 2д4 колючої шкоди за кожні 5 футів переміщення там. Пастка замаскована під природний ландшафт.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description:
You create a floating, spectral force that resembles a weapon of your choice and lasts for the duration. The weapon appears in an unoccupied space within range. 

When you cast the spell, you can make a melee spell attack against a creature within 5 feet of the weapon. On a hit, the target takes Force damage equal to 1d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. 

As a Bonus Action on your later turns, you can move the weapon up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 feet of it.
description_ua: Ви створюєте примарну зброю, яка ширяє в повітрі. Ви можете здійснювати нею ближні атаки заклинанням (1д8 + заклинальна характеристика шкоди силою). Бонусною дією можна переміщувати зброю на 20 футів та атакувати.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for every two spell slot levels above 2.

name: Suggestion
material: a snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil
description:
You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) and magically influence one creature you can see within range that can hear and understand you. Creatures that have Immunity to the Charmed condition succeed on the saving throw automatically. The suggestion must be worded in such a manner as to make the course of action sound reasonable. Asking the creature to stab itself, throw itself onto a spear, immolate itself, or do some other obviously harmful act ends the spell. 

The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, it pursues the course of action you described to the best of its ability. The suggested course of action can continue for the entire duration. If the suggested activity can be completed in a shorter time, the spell ends when the target finishes what it was asked to do. 

You can also specify conditions that will trigger a special activity during the duration. For example, you might suggest that a knight give her warhorse to the first beggar she meets. If the condition isn't met before the spell expires, the activity isn't performed. 

If you or any of your companions damage the target, the spell ends.
description_ua: Ви пропонуєте істоті курс дій (речення-два). Ціль проходить ряткидок Мудрості. У разі провалу вона виконує вашу пораду, якщо вона звучить розумно. Заклинання триває до 8 годин або до завершення дії.

name: Warding Bond
material: a pair of platinum rings worth 50+ GP each, which the spell consume
description:
This spell wards a willing creature you touch and creates a mystic connection between you and the target until the spell ends. While the target is within 60 feet of you, it gains a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws, and it has Resistance to all damage. Also, each time it takes damage, you take the same amount of damage. 

The spell ends if you drop to 0 Hit Points or if you and the target are more than 60 feet apart. It also ends if the spell is cast again on either of the connected creatures. You can also dismiss the spell as a Bonus Action.
description_ua: Ви створюєте містичний зв'язок з доброю істотою. Ціль отримує +1 до КК та ряткидків, а також Стійкість до всієї шкоди. Проте ви отримуєте таку ж кількість шкоди, як і вона.

name: Web
description:
You create a mass of thick, sticky webbing in a 20-foot Cube at a point within range. The webs fill the area for the duration and are Difficult Terrain. 

If the webs aren't anchored between two solid masses (such as walls or trees) or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling, the webs collapse, and the spell ends at the start of your next turn. Webs layered over a flat surface have a depth of 5 feet. 

Each creature that enters the webs or ends its turn there must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or have the Restrained condition. A Restrained creature can take an action to make a Strength (Athletics) check against your spell save DC. On a success, the creature is no longer Restrained. 

The webs are flammable. Any 5-foot Cube of webs exposed to fire burns away in 1 round, dealing 2d4 Fire damage to any creature that ends its turn in the fire.
description_ua: Ви створюєте липку павутину в Кубі зі стороною 20 футів. Істоти там повинні пройти ряткидок Спритності або стати Окутаними. Павутина горить, завдаючи 2д4 шкоди вогнем.

name: Zone of Truth
description:
You create a magical zone that guards against deception in a 15- foot-radius Sphere centered on a point of your choice within range. Until the spell ends, a creature that enters the spell's area or ends its turn there makes a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, a creature can't speak a deliberate lie while in the radius. You know whether each creature succeeds or fails its saving throw. 

An affected creature is aware of the spell and can thus avoid answering questions to which it would normally respond with a lie. Such a creature can be evasive in its answers as long as it remains within the boundaries of the truth.
description_ua: Ви створюєте Сферу радіусом 15 футів. Істоти, що провалили ряткидок Харизми, не можуть навмисно брехати в цій зоні. Ви знаєте, хто провалив кидок.

name: Animate Dead
material: a drop of blood and a pinch of bone dust
description:
This spell creates an Undead servant. Choose a pile of bones or a corpse of a Medium or Small Humanoid within range. Your spell imbues the target with a foul mimicry of life, raising it as an Undead creature. The target becomes a **Skeleton** if you chose bones or a **Zombie** if you chose a corpse. 

**Combat.** The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, it shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your mental commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger. 

**Control.** The creature is under your control for 24 hours, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it. To maintain control of the creature for another 24 hours, you must cast this spell on the creature again before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to four creatures you have animated with this spell, rather than animating a new one.
description_ua: Ви створюєте слугу-Нежить із трупа (Зомбі) або кісток (Скелет). Він діє за вашими ментальними командами у бою. Контроль триває 24 години, після чого заклинання потрібно накласти знову.
higherLevelSlot: You animate or reassert control over two additional Undead creatures for each spell slot level above 3. Each of the creatures must come from a different corpse or pile of bones.

name: Aura of Vitality
description: Healing energy radiates from you in a 30-foot Emanation. Until the spell ends, you can take a Bonus Action to cause one creature in the Emanation to regain 2d6 Hit Points.
description_ua: Цілюща енергія виходить від вас у радіусі 30 футів. Бонусною дією ви можете зцілити одну істоту в цій зоні на 2д6 хіт-пойнтів.

name: Beacon of Hope
description: This spell bestows hope and vitality. Choose any number of creatures within range. For the duration, each target has Advantage on Wisdom saving throws and death saving throws, and regains the maximum number of Hit Points possible from any healing.
description_ua: Обрані істоти мають Перевагу на ряткидки Мудрості та ряткидки від смерті. Також вони отримують максимально можливу кількість хіт-пойнтів від будь-якого лікування.

name: Bestow Curse
description:
You touch a creature, and that creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become cursed for the duration. When you cast the spell, choose the nature of the curse from the following options: 

• Choose one ability. While cursed, the target has Disadvantage on ability checks and saving throws made with that ability. 

• While cursed, the target has Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. 

• While cursed, the target must make a Wisdom saving throw at the start of each of its turns. On a failed save, it wastes its action that turn doing nothing. 

• While cursed, your attacks and spells deal an extra 1d8 Necrotic damage to the target. 

A Remove Curse spell ends this effect.
description_ua: Ви проклинаєте ціль (рядок Мудрості). Оберіть ефект: штраф до характеристик, перешкода в атаках проти вас, шанс втратити дію або додаткова некротична шкода від ваших атак.
higherLevelSlot: If you use a spell slot of level 4 or higher, the duration is Concentration, up to 10 minutes. If you use a spell slot of level 5 or higher, the duration is 8 hours. If you use a spell slot of level 7 or higher, the duration is 24 hours. If you use a spell slot of level 9, the spell lasts until it is dispelled. Using a spell slot of level 5 or higher grants a duration that doesn't require Concentration.

name: Blinding Smite
castingTrigger: which you take immediately after hitting a target with a melee weapon or an unarmed strike
description: As you hit the target, it takes an extra 3d8 Radiant damage from the attack. The target must also succeed on a Constitution saving throw or have the Blinded condition until the spell ends. As an action, the Blinded target can make a Constitution (Medecine) check against your spell save DC, ending the condition on a success.
description_ua: При влучанні ціль отримує додатково 3д8 шкоди сяйвом. Також вона повинна пройти ряткидок Витривалості, інакше стане Сліпою.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Blink
description:
Roll a d20 at the end of each of your turns for the duration of the spell. On a roll of 11 or higher, you vanish from your current plane of existence and appear in the Ethereal Plane (the spell fails and the casting is wasted if you were already on that plane). At the start of your next turn, and when the spell ends if you are on the Ethereal Plane, you return to an unoccupied space of your choice that you can see within 10 feet of the space you vanished from. If no unoccupied space is available within that range, you appear in the nearest unoccupied space (chosen at random if more than one space is equally near). You can dismiss this spell as an action. 

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can see and hear the plane you originated from, which is cast in shades of gray, and you can't hear anything there. Creatures on the plane of origin can't see or hear you unless they have a special ability that allows them to perceive things on the Ethereal Plane. You can only affect and be affected by other creatures on the Ethereal Plane. Creatures that aren't there can't perceive you and can't interact with you, unless a special ability or magic has given them the ability to do so.
description_ua: Наприкінці кожного ходу кидайте к20. При 11+ ви переміщуєтеся на Ефірний план. На початку наступного ходу ви повертаєтеся назад.

name: Call Lightning
description:
A churning storm cloud forms, centered on a point you can see 100 feet directly above you. The spell fails if you can't see a point in the air where the storm cloud could appear (for example, if you are in a cavern that isn't high enough). 

When you cast the spell, choose a point you can see within range. A bolt of lightning flashes from the cloud to that point. Each creature within 5 feet of that point makes a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 3d10 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. On each of your later turns as a Magic action, you can call down another bolt in this way, targeting the same point or a different one. 

If you are outdoors in stormy conditions when you cast this spell, the spell gives you control over the existing storm instead of creating a new one. Under such conditions, the spell's damage increases by 1d10.
description_ua: Ви створюєте штормову хмару над собою. Кожного ходу ви можете Магічною дією спрямовувати блискавку в точку на землі, завдаючи 3д10 шкоди блискавкою (рядок Спритності).
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Clairvoyance
material: a focus worth 100+ GP (either a jeweled horn for hearing or a glass eye for seeing)
description:
You create an invisible, magical sensor at a familiar location within range (a location whose general appearance you know) or at a particular location you can see. The sensor remains in place for the duration, and it can't be attacked or otherwise interacted with. 

When you cast the spell, you choose seeing or hearing. You can use the chosen sense through the sensor as if you were in its space. As a Bonus Action, you can switch between seeing and hearing. 

A creature that can see the sensor (such as one using See Invisibility or Truesight) sees a luminous, intangible orb about the size of your fist.
description_ua: Ви створюєте невидимий сенсор у знайомому місці. Оберіть зір або слух: ви будете сприймати інформацію так, ніби самі перебуваєте в тій точці. Бонусною дією можна перемикатися між зором та слухом.

name: Conjure Animals
description:
You summon nature spirits that take the form of a pack of spectral animals and occupy a 10-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within range. Until the spell ends, any creature of your choice that enters the Sphere or ends its turn there takes 3d10 Slashing damage. 

As a Bonus Action, you can move the Sphere up to 30 feet to a point within range.
description_ua: Ви закликаєте духів природи у формі зграї тварин у Сфері радіусом 10 футів. Істоти там отримують 3д10 ріжучої шкоди. Сферу можна рухати на 30 футів бонусною дією.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Conjure Barrage
material: a weapon or piece of ammunition
description: You throw a nonmagical weapon or fire a piece of nonmagical ammunition into the air to create a cone of identical weapons that shoot forward and then disappear. Each creature in a 60-foot Cone makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d8 damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. The damage type is the same as that of the weapon or ammunition used as a component.
description_ua: Ви вистрілюєте або кидаєте снаряд, створюючи Конус довжиною 60 футів із таких самих снарядів. Істоти отримують 3д8 шкоди (рядок Спритності). Тип шкоди збігається з типом зброї.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Counterspell
castingTrigger: which you take when you see a creature within 60 feet of yourself casting a spell
description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. The creature makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the spell fails and has no effect.
description_ua: Ви намагаєтеся перервати створення заклинання іншою істотою. Ціль проходить ряткидок Витривалості. У разі провалу заклинання переривається і не дає жодного ефекту.

name: Daylight
description:
A 60-foot-radius Sphere of light spreads from a point you choose within range. The Sphere is Bright Light and sheds Dim Light for an additional 60 feet. 

If you chose a point on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the light shines from the object and moves with it. Completely covering the affected object with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the light. 

If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of Darkness created by a spell of level 3 or lower, the spell that created the Darkness is dispelled.
description_ua: Сфера світла радіусом 60 футів виникає в точці або на предметі. Випромінює яскраве світло. Розвіює магічну темряву 3-го рівня або нижчу.

name: Dispel Magic
description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The DC equals 10 plus the spell's level. On a successful check, the spell ends.
description_ua: Розвіює будь-яке заклинання 3-го рівня або нижче на цілі. Для вищих рівнів потрібно пройти перевірку заклинальної характеристики (КС 10 + рівень заклинання).
higherLevelSlot: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of level 4 or higher, you automatically end the effects of a spell on the target if the spell's level is less than or equal to the level of the spell slot you used.

name: Elemental Weapon
description: A nonmagical weapon you touch becomes a magic weapon. Choose one of the following damage types: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. For the duration, the weapon has a +1 bonus to attack rolls and deals an extra 1d4 damage of the chosen type on a hit.
description_ua: Немагічна зброя стає магічною з бонусом +1 до атак і +1д4 стихійної шкоди на ваш вибір (кислота, холод, вогонь, блискавка або грім).
higherLevelSlot: The bonus increases to +2 and the extra damage increases to 2d4 with a spell slot of level 5 or 6. The bonus increases to +3 and the extra damage increases to 3d4 with a spell slot of level 7 or higher.

name: Fear
material: a white feather or the heart of a hen
description:
You project a phantasmal image of a creature's worst fears. Each creature in a 30-foot Cone makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, a creature has the Frightened condition for the duration. 

While Frightened by this spell, a creature must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest available route on each of its turns, unless there is nowhere to move. If the creature ends its turn in a location where it doesn't have line of sight to you, the creature can make a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the spell ends for that creature.
description_ua: У Конусі довжиною 30 футів ви створюєте видіння найгірших страхів. Істоти повинні пройти ряткидок Мудрості, інакше стануть Наляканими та будуть змушені тікати від вас.

name: Feign Death
description:
You touch a willing creature and put it into a cataleptic state that is indistinguishable from death. 

For the duration, the target has the Blinded and Incapacitated conditions, and its Speed is 0. The target has Resistance to all damage except Psychic damage. If the target is diseased or Poisoned when you cast the spell, or becomes diseased or Poisoned while under the spell's effect, the disease and poison have no effect until the spell ends.
description_ua: Ви занурюєте добру істоту в стан заціпеніння, що не відрізняється від смерті. Вона стає Сліпою, Недієздатною, її швидкість падає до 0, і вона отримує Стійкість до всієї шкоди крім психічної.

name: Fireball
material: a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur
description:
A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose within range and then blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point makes a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 8d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. 

The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.
description_ua: У точці вибухає вогняна куля радіусом 20 футів. Істоти отримують 8д6 шкоди вогнем (рядок Спритності). Вогонь огинає кути та підпалює предмети.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Fly
description: You touch a willing creature. The target gains a Fly Speed of 60 feet for the duration. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft, unless it can stop the fall.
description_ua: Добра істота отримує швидкість польоту 60 футів. Якщо термін дії закінчується, коли істота ще в повітрі, вона падає.
higherLevelSlot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Gaseous Form
material: a bit of gauze and a drop of smoke
description:
You transform a willing creature you touch, along with everything it's wearing and carrying, into a misty cloud for the duration. The spell ends if the target drops to 0 Hit Points. An unwilling creature can make a Constitution saving throw to resist this spell. 

While in this form, the target's only method of movement is a Fly Speed of 10 feet. The target can hover and can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has Resistance to nonmagical damage, and it has Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws. The target can pass through small holes, narrow openings, and even mere cracks, though it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces. 

The target can't talk, manipulate objects, or take any actions besides Dash or to use a Bonus Action to end this spell. Any objects it was carrying or holding can't be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. The target can't cast spells or take the Attack action.
description_ua: Ви перетворюєте істоту на туманну хмару. Вона отримує швидкість польоту 10 футів, Стійкість до немагічної шкоди та може проходити крізь щілини. Вона не може атакувати та чаклувати.

name: Glyph of Warding
material: incense and powdered diamond worth 200+ GP, which the spell consume
description:
When you cast this spell, you inscribe a glyph that harms other creatures, either upon a surface (such as a table or a section of floor or wall) or within an object that can be closed (such as a book, a scroll case, or a treasure chest) to conceal the glyph. The glyph can cover an area no larger than 10 feet in diameter. If the surface or object is moved more than 10 feet from where you cast this spell, the glyph is broken, and the spell ends without being triggered. 

The glyph is nearly invisible and requires a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC to be found. 

You decide what triggers the glyph when you cast the spell. For glyphs inscribed on a surface, the most typical triggers include stepping on the glyph, removing another object covering the glyph, approaching within a certain distance of the glyph, or manipulating the object on which the glyph is inscribed. For glyphs inscribed within an object, the most common triggers include opening that object, approaching within a certain distance of the object, or seeing or reading the glyph. Once a glyph is triggered, this spell ends. 

You can further refine the trigger so the spell activates only under certain circumstances or according to physical characteristics (such as height or weight), creature kind (for example, the ward could be set to affect Aberrations or drow), or alignment. You can also set conditions for creatures that don't trigger the glyph, such as those who say a certain password. 

When you inscribe the glyph, choose Explosive Runes or a Spell Glyph. 

**Explosive Runes.** When triggered, the glyph erupts with magical energy in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on the glyph. The Sphere spreads around corners. Each creature in the area makes a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 5d8 Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder damage on a failed save (your choice when you create the glyph) or half as much damage on a successful one. 

**Spell Glyph.** You can store a prepared spell of level 3 or lower in the glyph by casting it as part of creating the glyph. The spell must target a single creature or an area. The spell being stored has no immediate effect when cast in this way. When the glyph is triggered, the stored spell is cast. If the spell has a target, it targets the creature that triggered the glyph. If the spell has an area, it is centered on that creature. If the spell summons hostile creatures or creates harmful objects or traps, they appear as close as possible to the intruder and attack it. If the spell requires Concentration, it lasts until the end of its full duration.
description_ua: Ви створюєте магічну пастку на поверхні або в предметі. Оберіть ефект: Вибухові руни (5д8 шкоди стихією) або Гліф заклинання (зберігає власне заклинання 3-го рівня або нижче). Ви самі визначаєте умову спрацювання.
higherLevelSlot: The damage of an Explosive Runes glyph increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3. If you create a Spell Glyph, you can store any spell of up to the same level as the spell slot you use for the Glyph of Warding.

name: Haste
description:
Choose a willing creature that you can see within range. Until the spell ends, the target's Speed is doubled, it gains a +2 bonus to AC, it has Advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and it gains an additional action on each of its turns. That action can be used only to take the Attack (one weapon attack only), Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object action. 

When the spell ends, the target can't move or take actions until after its next turn, as a wave of lethargy sweeps over it.
description_ua: Ви прискорюєте добру істоту: її Швидкість подвоюється, вона отримує +2 до КК, Перевагу на ряткидки Спритності та додаткову дію щоходу (Атака, Ривок, Відхід, Схов або Використання предмета). Коли заклинання зникає, ціль втрачає хід.

name: Hunger of Hadar
description:
You open a gateway to the dark between the stars, a region infested with unknown horrors. A 20-foot-radius Sphere of blackness and bitter cold appears, centered on a point within range and lasting for the duration. This void is filled with a cacophony of soft whispers and slurping noises that can be heard up to 30 feet away. No light, magical or otherwise, can illuminate the area, and creatures fully within the area have the Blinded condition. 

The void creates a warp in the fabric of space, and the area is Difficult Terrain. Any creature that starts its turn in the area takes 2d6 Cold damage. Any creature that ends its turn in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 Acid damage as milky, otherworldly tentacles rub against it.
description_ua: Ви створюєте Сферу магічної темряви радіусом 20 футів. Це Важкопрохідна місцевість. Істоти на початку ходу отримують 2д6 шкоди холодом, а вкінці — 2д6 шкоди кислотою (рядок Спритності).

name: Hypnotic Pattern
material: a glowing stick of incense or a crystal vial filled with phosphorescent material
description:
You create a twisting pattern of colors that weaves through the air inside a 30-foot Cube within range. The pattern appears for a moment and vanishes. Each creature in the area who sees the pattern must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature has the Charmed condition for the duration. While Charmed by this spell, the creature has the Incapacitated condition and has a Speed of 0. 

The spell ends for an affected creature if it takes any damage or if someone else uses an action to shake the creature out of its stupor.
description_ua: Ви створюєте мерехтливий візерунок у Кубі зі стороною 30 футів. Істоти, що його побачили, мають пройти ряткидок Мудрості, інакше стануть Зачарованими, Недієздатними та отримають швидкість 0. Ефект знімається шкодою або дією іншої істоти.

name: Leomund's Tiny Hut
description:
A 10-foot-radius immobile dome of force springs into existence around and above you and remains stationary for the duration. The spell ends if you leave its area. 

Nine creatures of Medium size or smaller can fit inside the dome with you. The spell fails if its area includes a larger creature or more than nine creatures. Creatures and objects within the dome when you cast this spell can move through it freely. All other creatures and objects are barred from passing through it. Spells and other magical effects can't extend through the dome or be cast through it. The atmosphere inside the space is comfortable and dry, regardless of the weather outside. 

Until the spell ends, you can command the interior to be dimly lit or dark. The dome is opaque from the outside, of any color you choose, but it is transparent from the inside.
description_ua: Ви створюєте нерухомий магічний купол радіусом 10 футів. До дев'яти істот можуть перебувати всередині. Купол захищає від зовнішніх атак та заклинань, підтримуючи комфортну атмосферу. Ви можете бачити назовні, але ззовні купол непрозорий.

name: Life Transference
description: You sacrifice some of your health to mend another creature's injuries. You take 4d8 Necrotic damage, which can't be reduced in any way, and one creature of your choice that you can see within range regains a number of Hit Points equal to twice the Necrotic damage you take.
description_ua: Ви жертвуєте своїм здоров'ям, щоб зцілити іншого. Ви отримуєте 4д8 некротичної шкоди (не можна зменшити), а обрана істота зцілюється на подвійну величину отриманої вами шкоди.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Lightning Bolt
material: a bit of fur and a rod of amber, crystal, or glass
description:
A stroke of lightning forming a Line 100 feet long and 5 feet wide blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the Line makes a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 8d6 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. 

The lightning ignites flammable objects in the Line that aren't being worn or carried.
description_ua: Ви випускаєте Лінію блискавки довжиною 100 футів. Істоти в ній отримують 8д6 шкоди блискавкою (рядок Спритності). Блискавка підпалює горючі предмети.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Magic Circle
material: holy water or powdered silver and iron worth 100+ GP, which the spell consume
description:
You create a 10-foot-radius, 20-foot-high Cylinder of magical energy centered on a point on the ground that you can see within range. Glowing runes appear wherever the Cylinder intersects with the floor or another surface. 

Choose one or more of the following creature types: Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, or Undead. The circle affects a creature of the chosen type in the following ways: 

• The creature can't willingly enter the Cylinder by nonmagical means. If the creature tries to use teleportation or interplanar travel to do so, it must first succeed on a Charisma saving throw. 

• The creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls against targets within the Cylinder. 

• Targets within the Cylinder can't be Charmed, Frightened, or possessed by the creature. 

When you cast this spell, you can elect to cause its magic to operate in the reverse direction, preventing a creature of the specified type from leaving the Cylinder and protecting targets outside it.
description_ua: Ви створюєте магічний Циліндр радіусом 10 футів для захисту від певних типів істот (аберації, небожителі, елементалі, феї, біси або нежить). Істоти цього типу не можуть увійти всередину та атакують з Перешкодою.
higherLevelSlot: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of level 4 or higher, the duration increases by 1 hour for each slot level above 3.

name: Major Image
description:
You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 20-foot Cube. The image appears at a spot that you can see within range and lasts for the duration. It seems completely real, including sounds, smells, and temperature appropriate to the thing depicted. You can't create sufficient heat or cold to cause damage, a sound loud enough to deal Thunder damage or deafen a creature, or a smell that might sicken a creature (like a Stinking Cloud spell). 

As long as you are within range of the illusion, you can use a Magic action to cause the image to move to any other spot within range. As the image changes location, you can alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the image. For example, if you create an image of a creature and move it, you can alter the image so that it appears to be walking. Similarly, you can cause the illusion to make different sounds at different times, even making it carry on a conversation, for example. 

Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, because things can pass through it. A creature that takes a Study action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, the creature can see through the image, and its other sensory effects become faint to the creature.
description_ua: Ви створюєте детальну ілюзію в Кубі зі стороною 20 футів. Вона включає звук, запах та температуру. Ви можете рухати ілюзію та змінювати її поведінку Магічною дією.
higherLevelSlot: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of level 6 or higher, the spell lasts until it is dispelled, without requiring your Concentration.

name: Mass Healing Word
description: As you call out words of restoration, up to six creatures of your choice that you can see within range regain Hit Points equal to 2d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on Undead or Constructs.
description_ua: Ви вигукуєте слова зцілення: до шести істот у межах дистанції відновлюють 2д4 + ваш модифікатор характеристики Одиниць Здоров'я. Не діє на Нежить та Конструкторів.
higherLevelSlot: The healing increases by 2d4 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Meld into Stone
description:
You step into a stone object or surface large enough to fully contain your body, melding yourself and all the equipment you are carrying with the stone for the duration. Using your movement, you step into the stone where you can see it. Nothing of your presence remains visible or otherwise detectable by nonmagical senses. 

While melded with the stone, you can't see what occurs outside it, and any Wisdom (Perception) checks you make to hear sounds outside it are made with Disadvantage. You remain aware of the passage of time and can cast spells on yourself while melded in the stone. You can use your movement to step out of the stone where you entered it, which ends the spell. You otherwise can't move. 

Minor physical damage to the stone doesn't harm you, but its partial destruction or a change in its shape (to the extent that you no longer fit within it) expels you and deals 6d6 Force damage to you. The stone's complete destruction (or transmutation into a different substance) expels you and deals 50 Force damage to you. If expelled, you are Prone in an unoccupied space next to where you first entered.
description_ua: Ви входите в кам'яний предмет або поверхню, зливаючись із каменем. Ви стаєте невидимим і невідчутним для звичайних чуттів. Перешкода на перевірки Сприйняття звуків ззовні. Ви можете вийти в будь-який момент, використавши рух.

name: Nondetection
material: diamond dust worth 25+ GP, which the spell consume
description: For the duration, you hide a target that you touch from divination magic. The target can be a willing creature or a place or an object no larger than 10 feet in any dimension. The target can't be targeted by any divination magic or perceived through magical scrying sensors.
description_ua: Ви ховаєте ціль (істоту або предмет) від магії віщування. Ціль неможливо знайти за допомогою магічних сенсорів або заклинань віщування.

name: Phantom Steed
description:
You summon an illusory, horselike creature in an unoccupied space of your choice within range. When you cast the spell, you can give the steed any appearance you choose. The steed has AC 10, 5 Hit Points, and a Speed of 100 feet. It can carry up to 480 pounds. If it takes any damage, it disappears, and the spell ends. 

The creature uses the statistics of a **Riding Horse**, except it has the Speed and Hit Points mentioned above. When the spell ends, the steed gradually fades, giving the rider 1 minute to dismount. The spell ends if you use an action to dismiss it or if the steed is more than 10 miles away from you.
description_ua: Ви закликаєте примарного коня. Він має КК 10, 5 Одиниць Здоров'я та Швидкість 100 футів. Зникає при отриманні шкоди.

name: Plant Growth
description:
This spell channels vitality into plants within a specific area. There are two possible uses for the spell, granting either immediate or long-term benefits. 

**Immediate.** You cast the spell as an action. Choose a point within range. All normal plants in a 100-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point become thick and overgrown. A creature moving through the area must spend 4 feet of movement for every 1 foot it moves. 

**Long-term.** You cast the spell over 8 hours, which enriches the land. All plants in a half-mile radius centered on a point within range become enriched for 1 year. The plants yield twice the normal amount of food when harvested.
description_ua: Ви наповнюєте рослини життям. Обраний варіант: або рослини в радіусі 100 футів стають непролазними хащами (рух коштує вчетверо дорожче), або земля в радіусі півмилі стає родючою на 1 рік (подвійний врожай).

name: Protection from Energy
description: For the duration, the willing creature you touch has Resistance to one damage type of your choice: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder.
description_ua: Обрана вами добра істота отримує Стійкість до одного типу шкоди на ваш вибір: Кислота, Холод, Вогонь, Блискавка або Грім.

name: Remove Curse
description: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains, but the spell allows its wielder to remove and discard it.
description_ua: Ваш дотик знімає всі прокляття з істоти або предмета. Якщо предмет — проклята магічна річ, саме прокляття залишається, але власник може її зняти та викинути.

name: Revivify
material: diamonds worth 300+ GP, which the spell consume
description: You touch a creature that has died within the last minute. That creature returns to life with 1 Hit Point. This spell can't return to life a creature that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts.
description_ua: Ви торкаєтеся істоти, що померла протягом останньої хвилини. Вона повертається до життя з 1 Одиницею Здоров'я. Не діє на тих, хто помер від старості, та не відновлює втрачені частини тіла.

name: Sending
material: a short piece of fine copper wire
description:
You send a short message of twenty-five words or fewer to a creature with which you are familiar. The creature hears the message in its mind, recognizes you as the sender if it knows you, and can answer in a like manner immediately. The spell enables creatures with Intelligence scores of at least 1 to understand the meaning of your message. 

You can send the message across any distance and even to other planes of existence, but if the target is on a different plane than you, there is a 5 percent chance that the message doesn't arrive.
description_ua: Ви надсилаєте повідомлення до 25 слів знайомій істоті. Вона чує його у розумі та може одразу відповісти. Працює на будь-якій відстані та між планами (з шансом невдачі 5% на інший план).

name: Sleet Storm
material: a pinch of dust and a few drops of water
description:
Until the spell ends, freezing rain and sleet fall in a 20-foot-radius, 20-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point within range. The area is Heavily Obscured, and it exposes everything within it to the following effects: 

• The area is Difficult Terrain. 

• Any ground in the area is covered with slick ice, making it turn into Difficult Terrain. When a creature enters the Cylinder for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there, it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or have the Prone condition. 

• If a creature is concentrating in the Cylinder, the creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC or lose Concentration.
description_ua: Крижаний дощ у Циліндрі радіусом 20 футів створює Важкопрохідну місцевість. Істоти всередині повинні проходити ряткидок Спритності, щоб не Впасти, та ряткидок Витривалості, щоб не втратити Концентрацію.

name: Slow
description:
You alter time around up to six creatures of your choice in a 40- foot Cube within range. Each target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be affected by this spell for the duration. 

An affected target's Speed is halved, it takes a −2 penalty to AC and Dexterity saving throws, and it can't take Reactions. On its turn, it can take either an action or a Bonus Action, not both. Regardless of the creature's abilities or magic items, it can't make more than one melee or ranged attack during its turn. 

If the target attempts to cast a spell with a casting time of 1 action, roll a d20. On an 11 or higher, the spell doesn't take effect until the target's next turn, and the creature must use its action on that turn to complete the spell. If it can't, the spell is wasted. 

A target affected by this spell makes another Wisdom saving throw at the end of its turn. On a successful save, the effect ends for it.
description_ua: Ви змінюєте плин часу для шести обраних істот у Кубі зі стороною 40 футів (рядок Мудрості). Їхня Швидкість та Коефіцієнт Класу зменшуються, вони не можуть використовувати Реакції та робити більше однієї атаки чи дії за хід.

name: Speak with Dead
description:
You grant the semblance of life and intelligence to a corpse of your choice within range, allowing it to answer the questions you pose. The corpse must still have a mouth and can't be Undead. The spell fails if the corpse was the target of this spell within the last 10 days. 

Until the spell ends, you can ask the corpse up to five questions. The corpse knows only what it knew in life, including the languages it knew. Answers are usually brief, cryptic, or repetitive, and the corpse is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if you are Hostile to it or it recognizes you as an enemy. This spell doesn't return the creature's soul to its body, only its animating spirit. Thus, the corpse can't learn new information, doesn't comprehend anything that has happened since it died, and can't speculate about future events.
description_ua: Ви надаєте подобу життя трупу, що має рот. Ви можете поставити йому до п’яти запитань. Труп знає лише те, що знав за життя. Він не зобов'язаний відповідати правдиво, якщо ви ворог.

name: Speak with Plants
description:
You imbue plants within 30 feet of you with limited sentience and animation, giving them the ability to communicate with you and follow your simple commands. You can question plants about events in the spell's area within the past day, gaining information about creatures that have passed, weather, and other circumstances. 

You can also gently coax them to turn Difficult Terrain into normal terrain if the plants in the area caused the difficulty (such as in the Entangle spell). Alternatively, you can cause normal terrain to become Difficult Terrain. 

Plants might also be able to perform other tasks on your behalf at the DM's discretion. The plants lack the knowledge to provide detailed descriptions of creatures or tell you about events outside the immediate area.
