If a plant creature is in the area, you can communicate with it as if you shared a common language, but you gain no magical ability to influence it.
description_ua: Ви наділяєте рослини в радіусі 30 футів обмеженою свідомістю. Ви можете розпитувати їх про події останньої доби або просити зробити місцевість важкопрохідною чи навпаки.

name: Spirit Shroud
description:
You call forth spirits of death, which flit around you for the duration. The spirits are intangible and invulnerable. 

Until the spell ends, any attack you make deals an extra 1d8 damage when you hit a creature within 10 feet of you. This damage is your choice of Necrotic, Radiant, or Cold damage. Any creature that takes this damage can't regain Hit Points until the start of your next turn. 

In addition, any creature of your choice that starts its turn within 10 feet of you has its Speed reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.
description_ua: Ви закликаєте духів смерті, що літають навколо вас. Атаки по істотах у межах 10 футів завдають додаткові 1д8 шкоди (некротична, промениста або холодом на вибір), і вони не можуть зцілюватися. Швидкість ворогів поруч зменшується на 10 футів.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d8 for every two spell slot levels above 3.

name: Stinking Cloud
material: a rotten egg or several skunk cabbage leaves
description:
You create a 20-foot-radius Sphere of yellow, nauseating gas centered on a point within range. The Sphere spreads around corners, and its area is Heavily Obscured. The gas lingers in the air for the duration. 

Each creature that ends its turn in the Sphere must succeed on a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature must use its action on its next turn to retch and reel. Creatures that don't need to breathe or are immune to the Poisoned condition succeed on the save automatically. 

A moderate wind (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses the cloud after 4 rounds. A strong wind (at least 20 miles per hour) disperses it after 1 round.
description_ua: Сфера жовтого газу радіусом 20 футів. Істоти, що закінчують хід у хмарі, повинні пройти ряткидок Витривалості, інакше змарнують наступну дію через нудоту.

name: Summon Fey
description:
You call forth a fey spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. This corporeal form uses the **Fey Spirit** stat block. When you cast the spell, choose a mood: Fuming, Mirthful, or Tricksy. The creature resembles a fey creature of your choice marked by the chosen mood, which determines certain traits in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends. 

**Combat.** The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your mental commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
description_ua: Ви закликаєте дух феї біля себе. Оберіть настрій: Гнівний, Веселий або Хитрющий. Фея б'ється на вашому боці, ходить одразу після вас і виконує ваші команди.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Summon Lesser Demons
material: a vial of blood from a humanoid killed within the past 24 hours
description:
You utter foul incantations, summoning demons from the Abyss. You summon spirits that take the form of eight demons of Challenge Rating 1/4 or lower. The demons appear in unoccupied spaces that you can see within range. A demon disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends. 

**Combat.** The demons are Hostile to all creatures, including you. Roll Initiative for the summoned demons as a group, which has its own turns. The demons pursue and attack the nearest non-demons to the best of their ability. 

As part of casting the spell, you can form a circle on the ground with the blood used as a material component. The circle is large enough to encompass your space. The summoned demons can't cross the circle or target anyone within it with their attacks or spells. Using the material component in this manner consumes it when the spell ends.
description_ua: Ви закликаєте вісім демонів (НП 1/4 або нижче). Вони ворожі до всіх, включаючи вас, та атакують найближчих істот. Ви можете створити захисне коло з крові, щоб вони вас не чіпали.

name: Summon Shadowspawn
material: tears inside a crystal vial worth 300+ GP
description:
You call forth a shadow spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. This corporeal form uses the **Shadow Spirit** stat block. When you cast the spell, choose an emotion: Fury, Despair, or Fear. The creature resembles a nightmarish creature of your choice marked by the chosen emotion, which determines certain traits in its stat block. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends. 

**Combat.** The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your mental commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
description_ua: Ви закликаєте тіньовий дух. Оберіть емоцію: Лють, Відчай або Страх. Дух б'ється на вашому боці, ходить одразу після вас і виконує ваші команди.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Summon Undead
description:
You call forth an undead spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. This corporeal form uses the **Undead Spirit** stat block. When you cast the spell, choose a form: Ghostly, Putrid, or Skeletal. The spirit resembles an undead creature of your choice marked by the chosen form, which determines certain traits in its stat block. The spirit disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends. 

**Combat.** The spirit is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the spirit shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your mental commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
description_ua: Ви закликаєте дух нежиті. Оберіть форму: Примарна, Гнила або Скелетна. Дух б'ється на вашому боці, ходить одразу після вас і виконує ваші команди.
higherLevelSlot: Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block.

name: Thunder Step
description:
You teleport to an unoccupied space you can see within range. Immediately after you disappear, a thunderous boom sounds, and each creature within 10 feet of the space you left makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 3d10 Thunder damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. The thunder can be heard from up to 300 feet away. 

You can bring along objects as long as their weight doesn't exceed what you can carry. You can also teleport one willing creature of your size or smaller who is carrying gear up to its carrying capacity. The creature must be within 5 feet of you when you cast this spell, and there must be an unoccupied space within 5 feet of your destination space for the creature to appear in; otherwise, the creature is left behind.
description_ua: Ви телепортуєтеся на 90 футів. У точці, яку ви покинули, лунає гуркіт, що завдає 3д10 шкоди громом навколишнім істотам (рядок Витривалості). Ви можете взяти з собою одну істоту поруч.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Tidal Wave
description: You conjure up a wave of water that crashes down on an area within range. The area can be up to 30 feet long, up to 10 feet wide, and up to 10 feet tall. Each creature in that area makes a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 4d8 Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't Prone. The water then spreads out as a thin layer across the ground for a few moments, extinguishing unprotected flames in its area and within 30 feet of it before it vanishes.
description_ua: Ви створюєте потужну хвилю води (30x10x10 футів). Істоти в зоні отримують 4д8 дробильної шкоди та Падають (рядок Спритності). Вода гасить вогонь навколо.

name: Tiny Servant
description:
You touch a Tiny, nonmagical object that isn't being worn or carried by another creature. The object animates and sprouts little arms and legs, becoming a creature under your control until the spell ends or until it drops to 0 Hit Points. See the **Tiny Servant** stat block for its statistics. 

**Combat.** The servant is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the servant shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your mental commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger. 

When the spell ends, the servant reverts to its original form, and any remaining Temporary Hit Points it has are lost.
description_ua: Ви оживляєте Крихітний немагічний предмет. Він отримує ручки та ніжки, б'ється на вашому боці та виконує команди. Після закінчення дії або при 0 ОЗ предмет повертається до початкової форми.
higherLevelSlot: You animate two additional Tiny objects for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Tongues
material: a small clay model of a ziggurat
description: This spell grants the creature you touch the ability to understand and speak the language of any intelligent creature it hears. Moreover, when the target speaks, any creature that knows at least one language and can hear the target understands what it says.
description_ua: Істота, якої ви торкнулися, розуміє та може говорити будь-якою почутою мовою. Її слова розуміє будь-хто, хто знає хоча б одну мову.

name: Vampiric Touch
description:
The touch of your shadow-wreathed hand can siphon life force from others to heal your wounds. Make a melee spell attack against a creature within your reach. On a hit, the target takes 3d6 Necrotic damage, and you regain Hit Points equal to half the amount of Necrotic damage dealt. 

Until the spell ends, you can make the attack again on each of your turns as a Magic action.
description_ua: Ви робите рукопашну атаку заклинанням. При влучанні ціль отримує 3д6 некротичної шкоди, а ви зцілюєтеся на половину цієї шкоди. Ви можете повторювати атаку щоходу Магічною дією.
higherLevelSlot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.

name: Water Breathing
material: a short reed or piece of straw
description: This spell grants up to ten willing creatures you can see within range the ability to breathe underwater until the spell ends. Affected creatures also retain their normal mode of respiration.
description_ua: До десяти добрих істот отримують здатність дихати під водою на 24 години.

name: Water Walk
description:
This spell grants the ability to move across any liquid surface— such as water, acid, mud, snow, quicksand, and lava—as if it were harmless solid ground (creatures crossing molten lava can still take damage from its heat). Up to ten willing creatures you can see within range gain this ability for the duration. 

If you target a creature that is submerged in a liquid, the spell carries the target to the surface of the liquid at a rate of 60 feet per round.
description_ua: До десяти добрих істот можуть ходити по будь-якій рідині (вода, лава, болото), як по твердій землі. Занурені істоти спливають на поверхню.

name: Wind Wall
material: a tiny fan and a portion of exotic sand
description:
A wall of strong wind rises from the ground at a point you choose within range. You can make the wall up to 50 feet long, 15 feet high, and 1 foot thick. You can shape the wall in any way you choose so long as it makes one continuous path along the ground. The wall lasts for the duration. 

When the wall appears, each creature within its area must make a Strength saving throw. A creature takes 3d8 Bludgeoning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. 

The strong wind keeps fog, smoke, and other gases at bay. Small or Tiny flying creatures or objects can't pass through the wall. Loose, lightweight materials brought into the wall fly upward. Arrows, bolts, and other ordinary projectiles launched at targets behind the wall are deflected upward and automatically miss. (Weapons such as giant-flung boulders, siege weapons, and other unusually heavy projectiles are not affected.) Creatures in gaseous form can't pass through it.
description_ua: Ви створюєте стіну вітру (до 50x15 футів). Істоти в зоні отримують 3д8 дробильної шкоди (рядок Сили). Стіна відхиляє снаряди, не пускає дрібних літаючих істот та гази.

name: Banishment
material: an item distasteful to the target
description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another plane of existence. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be banished. If the target is native to the plane of existence you're on, you banish it to a harmless demiplane. While there, the target has the Incapacitated condition. If the target is native to a different plane of existence, the target is banished to its home plane with a faint popping noise.
description_ua: Ви намагаєтеся вигнати істоту в інший план існування. Ціль має пройти ряткидок Харизми, інакше зникне. Якщо вона місцева — потрапляє в нешкідливий напівплан (Недієздатна), якщо з іншого плану — повертається додому.

name: Blight
description: Necromantic energy washes over a creature of your choice that you can see within range, draining moisture and vitality from it. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. The target takes 8d8 Necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
description_ua: Некротична енергія висмоктує життя з цілі. Вона має пройти ряткидок Витривалості, отримуючи 8д8 шкоди некротичною енергією при провалі (половину при успіху).

name: Dimension Door
description: You teleport yourself from your current location to any other spot within range. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction, such as "200 feet straight downward" or "upward to the northwest at a 45-degree angle, 300 feet."
description_ua: Ви телепортуєтеся в будь-яку точку в межах 500 футів. Ви можете взяти з собою одну істоту свого розміру або меншу, якщо вона охоча.

name: Greater Invisibility
description: You or a creature you touch becomes Invisible until the spell ends.
description_ua: Ви або істота, якої ви торкаєтеся, стаєте Невидимими. На відміну від звичайної невидимості, ця не зникає при атаці чи накладенні заклинаннь.

name: Polymorph
description:
This spell transforms a creature that you can see within range into a new form. An unwilling creature must make a Wisdom saving throw to avoid the effect. A Shapechanger automatically succeeds on this saving throw. 

The transformation lasts for the duration, or until the target drops to 0 Hit Points or dies. The new form can be any Beast whose Challenge Rating is equal to or less than the target's (or the target's level, if it doesn't have a Challenge Rating).
description_ua: Ви перетворюєте істоту на звіра, чий небезпеку (CR) не перевищує рівень цілі. Неохоча ціль проходить ряткидок Мудрості.

name: Wall of Fire
description:
You create a wall of fire on a solid surface within range. You can make the wall up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 feet in diameter, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick. The wall is opaque and lasts for the duration. 

When the wall appears, each creature within its area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 5d8 Fire damage, or half as much damage on a successful one. 

One side of the wall, selected by you when you cast this spell, deals 5d8 Fire damage to each creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of that side or inside the wall. A creature takes the same damage when it enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side of the wall deals no damage.
description_ua: Ви створюєте стіну вогню. Кожна істота в зоні при появі проходить ряткидок Спритності чи отримує 5д8 шкоди вогнем. Одна сторона стіни також завдає шкоди істотам, що стоять поруч.
